critical.mandate: Output must include machine-readable PASS/FAIL status in YAML frontmatter
Report ALL findings, not just the first failure

step.title: Completeness Check
step.action: Verify all required sections exist: overview, personas, functional reqs, NFRs, user journeys, data, integrations, constraints, success criteria
Flag any missing sections as critical findings

step.title: Quality Check
step.action: For each requirement verify: testable, unambiguous, prioritized
Flag vague requirements (e.g., "fast", "easy to use" without quantification)

step.title: Generate Validation Report
step.template-output: Generate validation report with YAML frontmatter containing machine-readable status: --- status: PASS or FAIL critical_issues: (count) warnings: (count) findings: - severity: critical/warning/info section: "(section name)" issue: "(description)" --- Then detailed findings with recommendations.
